figures.caption: Table 2 – Volatility-Adjusted Sharpe Ratio Table A summary table showing the computed Sharpe ratios adjusted for volatility across six assets (three cryptocurrencies and three traditional market instruments) over the period 2018–2023. This table provides a comparative assessment of strategic resilience across all assets.

Figure 1 – Bar Chart of Strategic Resilience A horizontal bar chart illustrating the ranking of all six assets based on their volatility-adjusted Sharpe ratios. This visual aids in identifying which assets demonstrate higher risk-adjusted performance, representing stronger intra-coalition strategic positions.

Figure 2– Comparison of the overall endurance indices for the cryptocurrency and traditional market coalitions during 2018–2023, illustrating the investor’s preference for the market with higher strategic resilience.
